playbook.intent: End-of-week RAG report that the offshore senior owns → client PM forwards upstream without rewriting, pre-empts Monday interrogation.
playbook.scope: Atomic weekly ceremony for an offshore senior who owns the report (not the PM). By Friday cutoff: a six-section RAG status with progress vs sprint goal, risks, asks, ready for upstream forwarding without rewriting. Bridges the gap between vendor-side ground truth and client-side stakeholder expectations.

success-criteria.criterion: Report sent inside the agreed window every Friday
RAG self-assessment defended by data, not vibes
Client PM forwards upstream without editing
Risk + ask section drives Monday's first decision

stage.name: Collect
stage.intent: Pull facts from the sprint board, not your head.

tasks.task: Pull risk register deltas this week
Identify open asks blocked on client side
Stakeholder-analysis on who the report needs to land for

outputs.output: Fact pack (sprint metrics, risk deltas, asks list)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every claim in the fact pack can be traced to a board, PR, or doc.

stage.name: Compose
stage.intent: Six sections, plain language, no padding.

tasks.task: Stakeholder narrative (storytelling for the upstream audience)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if every RAG colour has data behind it.

stage.name: Send + follow-up
stage.intent: Ship inside the window and pre-empt the Monday interrogation.

tasks.task: Send to client PM in the agreed channel by Friday cutoff
Pin asks at the top of Monday's first comms

stage.decision-gate: Done only after client PM has acknowledged. Silence = follow-up Monday morning.

extra.value: [Daily standup coverage — that's a separate playbook, Steerco-level reporting — that's a different cadence, Sprint review demo — separate event]
[Active sprint or milestone with defined goal, Risk register exists for the engagement, Asks pipeline (open dependencies) visible]
[Green RAG every week — kills the signal value, Asks buried at the bottom — the upstream reader never sees them, 'Sending Friday 23:55 your time — the client PM cannot use it']
['Could the client CEO read it cold and know what''s hot?', 'Did I name every ask + owner + decision date?', 'Did I send in the window the client PM can act on?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-client-status-report-outsource --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-client-status-report-outsource --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-client-status-report-outsource --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
